3-18 ay, belirli kapsam-bütçe-takvim. <b: 3-18 months, defined scope-budget-schedule. It can be under a Strategic Initiative OR directly linked to a Process (both are also possible).
3-5 years, a detailed breakdown of the main heading. From here execution splits into two branches ↓
5-10 yıllık yön kararı, 4-8 adet. Bitiş: A 5-10 year directional decision, 4-8 of them. NO end date, NO budget.
<b>1-3 yıl · BÜTÇELİ · sponsorlu</b>. An: 1-3 years · BUDGETED · sponsored. Linked to the main and/or sub-strategy. A Hoshin "breakthrough" move.
<b>İki kol farkı:</b> <b>Operasyonel kol: The two-branch difference: The operational branch runs the existing work (processes, continuous). The breakthrough branch brings a new change (initiative, with a defined start and end). The Project is the bridge: It stands right in the middle because it can be positioned both under a Strategic Initiative and directly under a Process. Initiative ≠ Project: An Initiative is "We will enter Germany" (a 3-year move), a Project is "We will set up the Munich office" (a 6-month concrete task).
